payload.task: ADD_TO_SPEC: Document the shutdown command for clean upgrades.
payload.spec_update:
## spec-editor shutdown Command

### Overview
 gracefully stops all agents, workers, and subprocesses.
Essential for clean upgrades to a new version (prevents orphaned processes,
frees ports, removes lock files).

### Usage
Project: /Users/dmitry/Documents/Droid/spec-editor2
Shutting down spec-editor...

               Stopping processes               
┏━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
┃ PID   ┃ Component           ┃ Status         ┃
┡━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┩
│ 70383 │ OpenCode subprocess │ SIGTERM sent ✓ │
│ 96855 │ Workflow engine     │ SIGTERM sent ✓ │
│ 57430 │ Coding agent worker │ SIGTERM sent ✓ │
│ 57431 │ Tester agent worker │ SIGTERM sent ✓ │
│ 57432 │ PM agent worker     │ SIGTERM sent ✓ │
│ 26373 │ Workflow engine     │ SIGTERM sent ✓ │
│ 21269 │ Workflow engine     │ SIGTERM sent ✓ │
│ 6304  │ Workflow engine     │ SIGTERM sent ✓ │
│ 3150  │ Workflow engine     │ SIGTERM sent ✓ │
└───────┴─────────────────────┴────────────────┘

  Waiting for processes to terminate...
  All processes stopped ✓

Cleanup:

Shutdown complete.
Project: /Users/dmitry/Documents/Droid/spec-editor2
Shutting down spec-editor...

  No spec-editor processes running

Cleanup:

Docker:
  Stopped container spec-editor-mcp

Shutdown complete.
Project: /Users/dmitry/Documents/Droid/spec-editor2
FORCE mode — using SIGKILL

  No spec-editor processes running

Cleanup:

Shutdown complete.
Project: /Users/dmitry/Documents/Droid/spec-editor2
DRY RUN — no processes will be stopped

  No spec-editor processes running

Cleanup:

Shutdown complete.

### Shutdown order (dependencies first)
1. OpenCode subprocesses (external tool)
2. Agent workers: coding → tester → project-manager → devops → spec_update
3. Workflow engine (spec-editor run)
4. MCP server (spec-editor mcp)
5. Docker containers (with --docker flag)
6. Lock files: .spec-editor-running

### Implementation
- File: src/cli/commands_shutdown.py
- Registered as CLI command: @cli.command("shutdown")
- Uses ps aux to find processes, os.kill(signal.SIGTERM) to stop
- Verifies termination; suggests --force if processes survive SIGTERM
payload.title: Shutdown Command — Graceful Agent Termination for Upgrades
